description_long: This hammer features a robust, cylindrical metal head with a flat striking face on one end and a rounded, dome-shaped peen on the other, suggesting a design similar to a sledge or engineer's hammer. The head is metallic, showing a slightly worn, matte finish with some surface irregularities and subtle dents, indicating use. The handle is straight and appears to be made of wood, with a natural grain visible and reinforced by two metal collars at the top and bottom. The lower portion of the handle is wrapped in a textured, grippy material, likely for enhanced handling and comfort during use. The overall construction is sturdy, with the head securely mounted to the handle, and the proportions suggest it is suitable for heavy-duty tasks. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, giving it a utilitarian appearance.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a cylindrical metal head and a straight, wood-and-metal reinforced handle featuring a textured grip. The head has a flat striking face and a rounded peen, showing signs of use.
description_view_0: The hammer is seen from the side, clearly showing the cylindrical head with a flat face and a rounded peen, as well as the full length of the straight, reinforced handle.
description_view_1: Viewed from the top, the rounded peen of the hammer head is prominent, with the handle and grip directly below, and the flat face of the head receding from view.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors the first, displaying the cylindrical head and handle, but with the flat striking face on the left and the rounded peen on the right.
description_view_3: From the bottom, the flat striking face of the hammer head is most visible, with the handle and grip extending downward.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with visible grain, reinforced by metal collars at both ends and wrapped in a textured, grippy material for enhanced handling.
attribute_head_type: Cylindrical steel head with a flat striking face on one end and a rounded, dome-shaped peen on the other, resembling a sledge or engineer's hammer.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible surface irregularities and subtle dents on the metal head, indicating some use.
